name: rota-inteligente
description: Gestão e Inteligência de Viagem — offline-first, HTML5 + Capacitor

scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:copy: npm run sync:web && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:build:android: npm run cap:sync && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug
